claims: The skill description for "Executive Summary Creator" lists "Bash" as an allowed tool, which grants broad system command execution privileges. This is excessive for a skill whose stated purpose is providing guidance, best practices, and generating code/configurations for creating executive summaries within enterprise workflows. A skill focused on document creation and advice does not inherently require the ability to execute arbitrary shell commands on the host system, posing a significant privilege escalation risk.
